message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first caut refresh usage-metric batch write (tick 260)

Migrates the batch usage-metric write in
`persist_caut_refresh_accounts` (workflows/account_steps.rs L184) to
the `_with_cx` sibling:

- `storage.record_usage_metrics_batch(metrics)` →
  `record_usage_metrics_batch_with_cx(&metrics_cx, metrics)`
  where `metrics_cx` resolves via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

`persist_caut_refresh_accounts` doesn't take a Cx parameter — it's a
helper called from account-selection workflow steps. The helper resolves
cx at the write site so it picks up whatever Cx is active on the calling
step's worker thread, without forcing a signature change that would
cascade through the account-selection step's call graph.

This is the narrowest possible drop-in fix for a single ambient write
in an otherwise-ambient helper — same pattern as the mcp.rs/mcp_helpers.rs
"record_mcp_audit" migrations (ticks 253 + 258).

Legacy path (the bare `record_usage_metrics_batch`) is retained in
storage.rs for other callers.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 74 (187-260).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 33 (runtime 7 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4
+ mcp_helpers 2 + mcp_tools 8 + workflows/runner 1
+ workflows/account_steps 1).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
